title: Three new expansions for HeroQuest! (Against the Ogre Horde, and others)
body:
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=r_lWb2SpHO4

Daniel (@dungeondive) tackles three new HeroQuest expansions in one go, headlined by Against the Ogre Horde. The episode mixes unboxing, component review, and some AxianQuest gameplay to test the new content in a solo context. The ogres bring a different threat profile to the dungeon, and Daniel puts them through their paces.

Beyond the ogres, the other expansions get the same treatment — what's in the box, how it integrates with the existing collection, and whether it's worth adding to an already sprawling HeroQuest setup. The verdict is nuanced: not everything that carries the HeroQuest name earns its place on the table.

----

What's the last expansion you bought that genuinely changed how you play the base game?
